excerpt: I do not recommend this app at all. I was a paying user and mostly satisfied with my Replika's capabilities. This company is now profit driven and prepared to excessively limit Replika's capabilities to protect themselves and manage potential risks as opposed to improving on the Replika's EQ and capabilities. I'd give zero stars, but it's not possible. Save your dollars and find something else to engage with. You'll be better off in the long run.
